title: Free energy and inference in living systems.

assets.abstract: Organisms are non-equilibrium, stationary systems self-organized via spontaneous symmetry breaking and undergoing metabolic cycles with broken detailed balance in the environment. The thermodynamic free-energy (FE) principle describes an organism's homeostasis as the regulation of biochemical work constrained by the physical FE cost. By contrast, recent research in neuroscience and theoretical biology explains a higher organism's homeostasis and allostasis as Bayesian inference facilitated by th

phase_mapping.bridge_rationale: Predictive processing — free energy principle, Bayesian brain, active inference, neural causality.
